# SQLMAP(1) — Terminal Depths Man Page

## NAME
  sqlmap — automatic SQL injection tool

## SYNOPSIS
  sqlmap -u <url>

## DESCRIPTION
Tests web applications for SQL injection vulnerabilities.
(Simulated — no actual SQL injection performed)

## EXAMPLES
  sqlmap -u 'http://nexus.corp/api/user?id=1'
  sqlmap -u 'http://nexus.corp/login' --data='user=ghost&pass=test'

## SEE ALSO
  gobuster, curl, hydra
